                name = DI_cs_trait_list

            }

            }

            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:overseer
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:sadistic
            }
        }
        court_position_type:seneschal_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_stewardship
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:administrator
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:organizer
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:overseer
            }
        }
        court_position_type:siege_engineer_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_martial
                value = 16
            }
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_stewardship
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:architect
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:diligent
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:military_engineer
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:patient
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:scholar
            }
        }
        court_position_type:stooge_camp_officer = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
        }
        court_position_type:travel_leader_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_stewardship
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:administrator
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:adventurer
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:brave
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:desert_warrior
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:diligent
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:flexible_leader
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:forest_fighter
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:jungle_stalker
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:lifestyle_herbalist
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:lifestyle_hunter
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:lifestyle_physician
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:lifestyle_traveler
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:open_terrain_expert
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:rough_terrain_expert
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:scholar
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:winter_soldier
            }
        }
        court_position_type:wet_nurse_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:loyal
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:physique_good_1
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:physique_good_2
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:physique_good_3
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:strong
            }
        }
        court_position_type:witness_camp_officer = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_diplomacy
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:diplomat
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:flagellant
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:gregarious
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:humble
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:loyal
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:trusting
            }
        }
        court_position_type:yeke_jarquchi_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_diplomacy
                value = 16
            }
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:administrator
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:honest
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:just
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:overseer
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:stubborn
            }
        }
        court_position_type:yurtchi_court_position = {
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_learning
                value = 16
            }
            set_variable = {
                name = DI_cs_stewardship
                value = 16
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:administrator
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:diligent
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:greedy
            }
            add_to_variable_list = {
                name = DI_cs_trait_list
                target = trait:overseer
            }
        }
        fallback = { }
    }
}

DI_apply_court_position_validity_effect = {
    switch = {
        trigger = $COURT_POSITION$
        court_position_type:akolouthos_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        OR = {
                            culture = culture:anglo_saxon
                            culture = culture:danish
                            culture = culture:english
                            culture = culture:norse
                            culture = culture:norwegian
                            culture = culture:old_saxon
                            culture = culture:scottish
                            culture = culture:swedish
                        }
                    }
                }
                random_list = {
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:anglo_saxon }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:danish }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:english }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:norse }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:norwegian }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:old_saxon }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:scottish }
                    1 = { set_culture = culture:swedish }
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:armorer_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = wrathful
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gregarious
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = humble
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:bodyguard_court_position = {
            remove_trait = blind
            remove_trait = infirm
        }
        court_position_type:camp_cook_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gluttonous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = humble
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:camp_priest_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = zealous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gregarious
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = compassionate
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = pilgrim
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = holy_warrior
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = faith_warrior
                }
            }
            set_character_faith = scope:target.faith
        }
        court_position_type:champion_court_position = {
            remove_trait = blind
            remove_trait = infirm
        }
        court_position_type:chief_engineer_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = patient
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = stubborn
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = eccentric
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = military_engineer
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = logistician
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:chief_eunuch_court_position = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = eunuch_1
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = beardless_eunuch
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:chief_forager_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = humble
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = eccentric
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = deceitful
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_mystic
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_gardener
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_herbalist
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_physician
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = scholar
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = witch
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:chief_qadi_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        OR = {
                            faith = faith:alawite
                            faith = faith:alevi
                            faith = faith:ashari
                            faith = faith:azariqa
                            faith = faith:druze
                            faith = faith:ghulat
                            faith = faith:hafizi
                            faith = faith:ibadi
                            faith = faith:imami
                            faith = faith:ismaili
                            faith = faith:masmudi
                            faith = faith:maturidi
                            faith = faith:mutazila
                            faith = faith:muwalladi
                            faith = faith:najdat
                            faith = faith:nizari
                            faith = faith:qarmatian
                            faith = faith:quranist
                            faith = faith:sufri
                            faith = faith:zayidi
                        }
                    }
                }
                random_list = {
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:alawite }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:alevi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ashari }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:azariqa }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:druze }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ghulat }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:hafizi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ibadi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:imami }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ismaili }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:masmudi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:maturidi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:mutazila }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:muwalladi }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:najdat }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:nizari }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:qarmatian }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:quranist }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:sufri }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:zayidi }
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_astrologer_court_position = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = nomadic_philosophy
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_mystic
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_brahmin_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        OR = {
                            faith = faith:acharya
                            faith = faith:advaitism
                            faith = faith:ari
                            faith = faith:avatamsaka
                            faith = faith:dhyana
                            faith = faith:kalikula_shaktism
                            faith = faith:krishnaism
                            faith = faith:lamaism
                            faith = faith:mahayana
                            faith = faith:maitreya
                            faith = faith:mantrayana
                            faith = faith:pundarika
                            faith = faith:saura
                            faith = faith:shaivism
                            faith = faith:smartism
                            faith = faith:srikula_shaktism
                            faith = faith:sukhavati
                            faith = faith:theravada
                            faith = faith:vaishnavism
                            faith = faith:vajrayana
                            faith = faith:vinaya
                            faith = faith:yogacara
                        }
                    }
                }
                random_list = {
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:acharya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:advaitism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ari }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:avatamsaka }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:dhyana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:kalikula_shaktism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:krishnaism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:lamaism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:mahayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:maitreya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:mantrayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:pundarika }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:saura }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:shaivism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:smartism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:srikula_shaktism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:sukhavati }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:theravada }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vaishnavism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vajrayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vinaya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:yogacara }
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_brewmaster_court_position = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_reveler
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = patient
                }
            }
            if = {
                limit = { age < 16 }
                set_age = 16
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_guru_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = {
                    NOT = {
                        OR = {
                            faith = faith:acharya
                            faith = faith:advaitism
                            faith = faith:ari
                            faith = faith:avatamsaka
                            faith = faith:dhyana
                            faith = faith:kalikula_shaktism
                            faith = faith:krishnaism
                            faith = faith:lamaism
                            faith = faith:mahayana
                            faith = faith:maitreya
                            faith = faith:mantrayana
                            faith = faith:pundarika
                            faith = faith:saura
                            faith = faith:shaivism
                            faith = faith:smartism
                            faith = faith:srikula_shaktism
                            faith = faith:sukhavati
                            faith = faith:theravada
                            faith = faith:vaishnavism
                            faith = faith:vajrayana
                            faith = faith:vinaya
                            faith = faith:yogacara
                        }
                    }
                }
                random_list = {
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:acharya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:advaitism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:ari }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:avatamsaka }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:dhyana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:kalikula_shaktism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:krishnaism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:lamaism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:mahayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:maitreya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:mantrayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:pundarika }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:saura }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:shaivism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:smartism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:srikula_shaktism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:sukhavati }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:theravada }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vaishnavism }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vajrayana }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:vinaya }
                    1 = { set_character_faith = faith:yogacara }
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_scholar_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = { age < 16 }
                set_age = 16
            }
        }
        court_position_type:eparch_court_position = {
            remove_trait = beardless_eunuch
            remove_trait = eunuch_1
        }
        court_position_type:executioner_court_position = {
            if = {
                limit = { age < 16 }
                set_age = 16
            }
        }
        court_position_type:garuda_court_position = {
            set_knight_status = force
        }
        court_position_type:head_groom_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = patient
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = calm
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:head_porter_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = humble
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = content
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = athletic
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:huntperson_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = patient
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = callous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = brave
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_hunter
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = athletic
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:kennelperson_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gregarious
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = stubborn
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:laureate_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gregarious
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = arrogant
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = fickle
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_poet
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_reveler
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:master_bard_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gregarious
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = arrogant
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = deceitful
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = lifestyle_poet
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = drunkard
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:master_of_arms_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = brave
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = stubborn
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = callous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = aggressive_attacker
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = unyielding_defender
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = organizer
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:master_of_hunt_court_position = {
            remove_trait = blind
            remove_trait = infirm
        }
        court_position_type:master_of_spoils_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = greedy
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = stubborn
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = just
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:master_thief_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = craven
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = deceitful
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = arbitrary
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:person_haggler_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = callous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = sadistic
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = greedy
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:quartermaster_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = greedy
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = gluttonous
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = diligent
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = logistician
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = organizer
                }
            }
        }
        court_position_type:wet_nurse_court_position = {
            remove_trait = devoted
        }
        court_position_type:witness_camp_officer = {
            random_list = {
                1 = {
                    add_trait = honest
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = just
                }
                1 = {
                    add_trait = brave
                }
            }
        }
        fallback = { }
    }
}

DI_apply_court_position_trait_xp_effect = {
    switch = {
        trigger = $COURT_POSITION$
        court_position_type:cherbi_court_position = {
            add_trait_xp = {
                trait = lifestyle_blademaster
                value = 100
            }
        }
        court_position_type:chief_forager_camp_officer = {
            add_trait_xp = {
                trait = lifestyle_traveler
                value = 75
            }
        }
        court_position_type:head_groom_camp_officer = {
            add_trait_xp = {
                trait = lifestyle_traveler
                value = 75
            }
        }
        fallback = { }
    }
}

DI_select_ordered_court_position_holder_effect = {
    switch = {
        trigger = scope:court_position_type
        court_position_type:bodyguard_court_position = {
            ordered_court_position_holder = {
                type = bodyguard_court_position
                order_by = {
                    value = aptitude:bodyguard_court_position
                    multiply = -1
                }
                save_scope_as = DI_selected_court_position_holder
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_artificer_court_position = {
            ordered_court_position_holder = {
                type = court_artificer_court_position
                order_by = {
                    value = aptitude:court_artificer_court_position
                    multiply = -1
                }
                save_scope_as = DI_selected_court_position_holder
            }
        }
        court_position_type:garuda_court_position = {
            ordered_court_position_holder = {
                type = garuda_court_position
                order_by = {
                    value = aptitude:garuda_court_position
                    multiply = -1
                }
                save_scope_as = DI_selected_court_position_holder
            }
        }
        court_position_type:lady_in_waiting_court_position = {
            ordered_court_position_holder = {
                type = lady_in_waiting_court_position
                order_by = {
                    value = aptitude:lady_in_waiting_court_position
                    multiply = -1
                }
                save_scope_as = DI_selected_court_position_holder
            }
        }
        court_position_type:minister_bureaucrat_court_position = {
            ordered_court_position_holder = {
                type = minister_bureaucrat_court_position
                order_by = {
                    value = aptitude:minister_bureaucrat_court_position
                    multiply = -1
                }
                save_scope_as = DI_selected_court_position_holder
            }
        }
        fallback = { }
    }
}

DI_revoke_selected_court_position_holder_effect = {
    if = {
        limit = { DI_should_use_ordered_court_position_revoke = yes }
        DI_select_ordered_court_position_holder_effect = yes
        if = {
            limit = { exists = scope:DI_selected_court_position_holder }
            revoke_court_position = {
                recipient = scope:DI_selected_court_position_holder
                court_position = scope:court_position_type
            }
        }
    }
    else = {
        revoke_court_position = { court_position = scope:court_position_type }
    }
}

DI_spawn_selected_court_position_effect = {
    DI_spawn_low_court_character_effect = yes
    scope:new_courtier = {
        DI_apply_court_position_validity_effect = { COURT_POSITION = scope:court_position_type }
        DI_apply_court_position_trait_xp_effect = { COURT_POSITION = scope:court_position_type }
        DI_court_position_post_spawn_effect = { COURT_POSITION = scope:court_position_type }
    }
    if = {
        limit = { NOT = { DI_can_employ_selected_court_position = yes } }
        DI_revoke_selected_court_position_holder_effect = yes
    }
    appoint_court_position = {
        recipient = scope:new_courtier
        court_position = scope:court_position_type
    }
}
